entries.value: Build an enterprise AI control plane for governed multi-vendor access
TypeScript, Fastify, Next.js 15, Supabase, pnpm monorepo
Functional > OOP, explicit error handling, no any types, vitest for tests
Solo founder, 2 design partners onboarding, pre-seed stage
Sprint 3: Make toolkit packages publishable for design partners
Supabase Auth with cookie-based sessions, dual path API key + JWT
